message:
🌱 Add consul: Connect Vault CA token updates are not retained on restart mission (#1276)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "consul-11363-connect-vault-ca-token-updates-are-not-retained-on-restart",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "consul: Connect Vault CA token updates are not retained on restart",
+    "description": "Connect Vault CA token updates are not retained on restart. This issue affects 9+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify consul troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your consul deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n consul -l app.kubernetes.io/name=consul
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=consul -n consul --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `"Failed to initialize secondary CA provider: error configuring provider: Error making API request.`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review consul configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant consul configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n consul -l app.kubernetes.io/name=consul
kubectl get configmap -n consul -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=consul
```
When filing a bug, please include the following headings if possible. Any example text in this template can be deleted."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Connect Vault CA token updates are not retained on restart",
+        "description": "This fixes a bug that was identified, which resulted in subsequent ConnectCA configuration updates in secondary DC's not persisting in the cluster.
```yaml
agent:
	check_monitors = 0
	check_ttls = 0
	checks = 3
	services = 3
build:
	prerelease = 
	revision = c976ffd2
	version = 1.10.3
consul:
	acl = enabled
	bootstrap = false
	known_datacenters = 3
	leader = true
	leader_addr = 172.16.18.231:8300
	server = true
raft:
	applied_index = 3459907
	commit_index = 3459907
	fsm_pending = 0
	last_contact = 0
	last_log_index = 3459907
	last_log_term = 31964
	last_snapshot_index = 3459154
	last_snapshot_term = 31964
	latest_configuration = [{Suffrage:Voter ID:0db759ad-0007-2ea4-4d41-62aff64515d5 Address:172.16.18.231:8300} {Suffrage:Voter ID:4de69dad-f717-c
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Connect Vault CA token updates are not retained… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=consul -n consul --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n consul --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `"Failed to initialize secondary CA provider: error configuring provider: Error making API request.` no longer appears in logs."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This fixes a bug that was identified, which resulted in subsequent ConnectCA configuration updates in secondary DC's not persisting in the cluster.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "agent:
	check_monitors = 0
	check_ttls = 0
	checks = 3
	services = 3
build:
	prerelease = 
	revision = c976ffd2
	version = 1.10.3
consul:
	acl = enabled
	bootstrap = false
	known_datacenters = 3
	leader = true
	leader_addr = 172.16.18.231:8300
	server = true
raft:
	applied_index = 3459907
	commit_index = 3459907
	fsm_pending = 0
	last_contact = 0
	last_log_index = 3459907
	last_log_term = 31964
	last_snapshot_index = 3459154
	last_snapshot_term = 31964
	latest_configuration = [{Suffrage:Voter ID:0db759ad-0007-2ea4-4d41-62aff64515d5 Address:172.16.18.231:8300} {Suffrage:Voter ID:4de69dad-f717-cb90-5c23-011fe0301004 Address:172.16.19.63:8300} {Suffrage:Voter ID:b846fa4a-7c4b-f797-33bb-31cd99211e35 Address:172.16.18.7:8300}]
	latest_configuration_index = 0
	num_peers = 2
	protocol_version = 3",
+        "2021-10-07T00:53:27.206Z [ERROR] agent.server.connect: CA root replication failed, will retry: routine="secondary CA roots watch" error="Failed to initialize secondary CA provider: error configuring provider: Error making API request.

URL: GET https://vault.sandbox.homexlabs.com/v1/auth/token/lookup-self
Code: 403. Errors:

* permission denied"",
+        "> consul connect ca get-config > connect_ca.json
# Edit connect_ca.json with new token
> consul connect ca set-config -config-file connect_ca.json
Error setting CA configuration: Unexpected response code: 500 (backend not initialized)"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
